title: Waste Sorting Detection Challenge
description: Detect and classify 19 categories of waste objects from conveyor belt images. Train your model and submit predictions on the hidden test set.
description_zh: 从传送带图像中检测和分类19类废弃物体。训练您的模型并在隐藏测试集上提交预测。

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
# Waste Sorting Detection Challenge

## About
Detect and classify waste objects from real conveyor belt images captured. Build the best object detection model across 19 waste categories.

## Dataset
- Train: 5,238 images with YOLO format labels
- Test: 1,312 images


## Classes (19 total)
| ID | Class | ID | Class |
|----|-------|----|-------|
| 0 | pet-bottle-clear | 10 | sachet |
| 1 | pet-bottle-green | 11 | tetrapack |
| 2 | ldpe-clear | 12 | cardboard-brown |
| 3 | ldpe-hm | 13 | paper-box |
| 4 | ldpe-black | 14 | coconut-shell |
| 5 | hdpe-bottle | 15 | footwear |
| 6 | metal-can | 16 | idpe-colored |
| 7 | milk-packet | 17 | hard-plastic |
| 8 | pp-bag | 18 | other |
| 9 | mlp-packet | | |

## How to Participate
1. Access the workstation via SSH (credentials shared separately)
2. Train your model on the provided dataset
3. Generate predictions.json on the workstation
4. Submit predictions.json here on Codabench

## Submission Format
Submit a single predictions.json file in COCO detection format:

[
  {
    "image_id": 0,
    "category_id": 3,
    "bbox": [x_min, y_min, width, height],
    "score": 0.91
  },
  ...
]

- image_id: 0-based index (images sorted alphabetically)
- category_id: integer 0-18
- bbox: absolute pixel coordinates [x_min, y_min, width, height]
- score: confidence between 0 and 1

## Metrics
- Primary rank: mAP50
- Tiebreaker: mAP50-95
- Also shown: Precision, Recall, F1, per-class AP for all 19 classes

## Rules
- Max 3 official submissions per day
- Any framework allowed (YOLO, RT-DETR, Detectron2...)
- Pretrained backbones allowed (COCO pretrain OK)
- Do not share credentials or workstation access
- Dataset must not be copied or downloaded
pages.content_zh:
# 垃圾分类检测挑战赛

## 关于本赛事
从真实传送带图像中检测和分类垃圾物体。在19个垃圾类别中构建最佳目标检测模型。

## 数据集
- 训练集：5,238张图像，YOLO格式标签
- 测试集：1,312张图像

## 类别（共19类）
| ID | 类别 | ID | 类别 |
|----|-------|----|-------|
| 0 | 透明宠物瓶 | 10 | 小包装袋 |
| 1 | 绿色宠物瓶 | 11 | 利乐包 |
| 2 | 透明LDPE | 12 | 褐色纸板 |
| 3 | LDPE-HM | 13 | 纸盒 |
| 4 | 黑色LDPE | 14 | 椰壳 |
| 5 | HDPE瓶 | 15 | 鞋类 |
| 6 | 金属罐 | 16 | 有色IDPE |
| 7 | 牛奶包 | 17 | 硬塑料 |
| 8 | PP袋 | 18 | 其他 |
| 9 | MLP包装 | | |

## 参赛方式
1. 通过SSH访问工作站（凭证单独提供）
2. 在提供的数据集上训练模型
3. 在工作站上生成predictions.json
4. 在Codabench上提交predictions.json

## 提交格式
提交单个predictions.json文件，采用COCO检测格式：

[
  {
    "image_id": 0,
    "category_id": 3,
    "bbox": [x_min, y_min, width, height],
    "score": 0.91
  },
  ...
]

- image_id：0基础索引（图像按字母顺序排序）
- category_id：整数0-18
- bbox：绝对像素坐标 [x_min, y_min, width, height]
- score：置信度0-1之间

## 评估指标
- 主要排名：mAP50
- 破平指标：mAP50-95
- 其他显示项：精确率、召回率、F1分数、全部19类的单类AP

## 规则
- 每天最多3次官方提交
- 允许任何框架（YOLO、RT-DETR、Detectron2等）
- 允许使用预训练骨干网络（COCO预训练可用）
- 不得共享凭证或工作站访问权限
- 数据集不得复制或下载
